name: ftd3xx

metadata.name: ftd3xx
metadata.summary: Python interface to ftd3xx.dll using ctypes

documentation:
# FTD3XX

A Python wrapper around FTDI's D3xx DLL.

This requires the [D3XX drivers](https://ftdichip.com/drivers/d3xx-drivers/) to be installed on the system.


## Credits
This code comes from FTDI's [examples page](https://ftdichip.com/software-examples/ft600-601-software-examples/).

modules.name: ftd3xx.defines
documentation: FT Status Codes

functions.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.call_ft
documentation: Call an FTDI function and check the status. Raise exception on error

functions.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.raiseExceptionOnError
documentation: Enable or disable exception handling

functions.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.getStrError
documentation: Return string equivalent for error status

functions.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.listDevices
documentation:
Return a list of serial numbers(default), descriptions or
locations (Windows only) of the connected FTDI devices depending on value of flags

functions.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.createDeviceInfoList
documentation: Create the internal device info list and return number of entries

functions.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.getDeviceInfoList
documentation: Get device info list and return number of entries

functions.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.getDeviceInfoDetail
documentation: Get an entry from the internal device info list.

functions.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.create
documentation:
Open a handle to a usb device by serial number, description or
index depending on value of flags and return an FTD3XX instance for it

functions.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.setTransferParams
documentation: Set transfer parameters for Linux only

classes.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.DeviceError
documentation: Exception class for status messages

classes.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.FTD3XX

methods.name: ftd3xx._ftd3xx.FTD3XX.__init__
documentation:
Create an instance of the FTD3XX class with the given device handle
and populate the device info in the instance dictionary. Set
update to False to avoid a slow call to createDeviceInfoList.
